nasb.text: But if a priest buys a slave as his property with his money, that one may eat of it, and those who are born in his house may eat of his food.

esv.text: but if a priest buys a slave as his property for money, the slave may eat of it, and anyone born in his house may eat of his food.

cnv.text: 但是祭司用自己銀子買來的僕人，就可以吃聖物；生在祭司家裡的人，他們可以吃他的食物。

ccb.text: 但出生在祭司家里或用钱买来的奴隶都可以吃。
